description_long: This hammer features a robust cylindrical head with spiked, gear-like ends and a pointed tip on one side, giving it a distinctive, almost medieval appearance. The head is adorned with rivet-like details and a banded midsection, suggesting reinforced construction. The handle is long, straight, and textured with a twisted pattern, transitioning from a wood-like brown to a reddish grip at the base, which ends in a sharp metal spike. The overall design is both functional and ornamental, with aggressive features that imply it could be used for heavy-duty or specialized tasks. The coloration is primarily natural wood and metal tones, with the grip area providing a visual accent. No visible branding or wear is present, and the hammer appears solid and well-crafted.
description: A heavy-duty hammer with a spiked, cylindrical head and a twisted, textured handle ending in a pointed grip. The design is ornate and robust, with natural wood and metal tones.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full cylindrical head with spiked ends and the entire length of the twisted handle with a pointed base.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the pointed tip of the hammer head and the circular cross-section of both the head and handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the spiked head and twisted handle clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the flat, gear-like end of the hammer head and the pointed base of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Twisted wooden straight handle with a reddish leather grip at the base, ending in a pointed metal spike. The handle is textured for enhanced grip.
attribute_head_type: Cylindrical sledge-type head with spiked, gear-like ends and a pointed tip on one side. The head is reinforced with rivet-like details and a central band.
